summary: A small rectangular structure with a stepped pyramid roof, featuring a wooden main body with stone brick foundation and trim. The building has four symmetrically placed windows on the front face and a dark wood/nether brick roof with multiple stepped layers. The structure sits on a raised stone brick platform surrounded by dirt.

shape.overall_form: rectangular box with stepped pyramid roof

rebuild_hints: Build stone brick foundation layer 2-3 blocks high
Construct wooden wall body with fence posts at corners
Place four evenly-spaced windows on front face with glass panes
Add stone brick trim band horizontally between walls and roof
Build stepped pyramid roof starting with nether brick, each layer recessed inward
Ensure bilateral symmetry in all roof steps
Surround with dirt platform and stone brick border
uncertainties: Exact window dimensions and spacing uncertain from angles provided
Roof material could be dark oak wood instead of nether brick
Precise height of foundation and trim bands requires closer inspection
Interior details not visible from exterior views
Exact block count for roof steps estimated from visual perspective
